title: Hook Fired Event
description: Emitted when a lifecycle hook is triggered (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, SessionStop, etc.).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the hook fired.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the current session.

hook_id.description: Unique identifier for this hook invocation.

hook_type.description: The lifecycle point at which this hook fires.

trigger.description: What caused the hook to fire (tool name, event type, etc.).

tool_name.description: The tool that triggered the hook, if applicable.

command.description: The command or path being evaluated, redacted of secrets.

message.description: Human-readable message produced by the hook (block reason, warning text, etc.).

duration_ms.description: Execution time of the hook in milliseconds.

exit_code.description: Exit code of the hook script, if it ran as a subprocess.

project.description: Project name from the working directory.
